name: Kadoya Sesame Mills Incorporated
summary: Kadoya Sesame Mills Incorporated engages in the development and sale of sesame oil products in Japan. The company offers cooking oil, such as pure, hot, and white sesame oil. It also provides edible seed products comprising sesame paste and roasted sesame seed; and sesame seed meal. The company offers its products for retail and food service/industrial uses. Its products are also used in general households and restaurants, as well as raw materials for processed food. Kadoya Sesame Mills Incorporated was founded in 1858 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
